g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Date' for a discrete scale with 14 values: 02-09, 02-10, 02-11, 02-12, 02-13, ending with 02-22
Y-axis titled 'Views' for a linear scale with values from 0 to 200
Symbol legend for fill color with 5 values: onshape-robotics-toolkit, TMotorCANControl, opensourceleg, neurobionicspi, anton
